reference: Hi, I am a college student who just tripped down the last two steps of a staircase, and I am worried about my ankle. My left ankle twisted and kind of crunched, and my friends helped me get back up to my room. I feel shaky and nauseous and cannot put weight on it. I almost passed out while getting back to my room. What should I do to care for my ankle?
text: Hi, I am a college student who just tripped on the last 2 steps of a staircase, and I am worried about my ankle. The Snell files; we have their efficiency ratings, the opening page. To my room. I feel shaky and nauseous, and cannot put weight on it. I almost passed out while getting back to my room; what should I do to care for my ankle?
